chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. Cr. Anti-Terrorism Acquittal Appeal No. 185 of 2021 The State represented by Mr. Ali Haider Saleem Additional Prosecutor General vs Hazrat Bilal and another Nemo Date of Hearing: 05.05.2025 Date of Decision: 08.07.2025 JUDGMENT Omar Sial, J.: Hazrat Bilal and Siddiqullah faced trial in a case arising out of F.I.R. No. 186 of 2020 registered under sections 11-I, 11-J and 11-B ATA, 1997 at the CTD police station on 28.11.2020. On 06.09.2021, the learned 12th Anti-Terrorism Court, Karachi acquitted the two accused under section 265-K Cr.P.C. 2. We have gone through the impugned judgment with the able assistance of the learned Additional Prosecutor General. The learned trial judge has given cogent reasons for his decision. Learned Additional Prosecutor has been unable to indicate any observation or finding that would tantamount to misreading or non-reading of evidence. We also do not see any jurisdictional issues. The appeal, yet to be admitted, is therefore dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
